args.query: SELECT book_id, title, details FROM books_info WHERE categories LIKE '%Literature & Fiction%' AND details LIKE '%English%';

exec_args.sql: SELECT book_id, title, details FROM books_info WHERE categories LIKE '%Literature & Fiction%' AND details LIKE '%English%';
